name: Sal Fisher — Sally face
description:
♧ SALLY FACE BOT! ♧
~°☆°~
Sally got along with most of the community at the high school he attended. Mostly except you - for some reason you and Sal don't get along and your interactions are always tense. Sal wants to change that.
`~°•~•°~`
OK PEOPLE, I've had the idea for this bot for a while now, but I've only decided to make it now. It's based on "Sally face" game, but it's probably obvious LMAO. Also, I slightly aged the bot up because y'know how it is with underage bots on this platform. Now this bot is labeled as Anypov so everyone can interact with it! This is my fifth public bot, so any advice is welcome ♡
`~°•~•°~`
I am not responsible for any problems related to the bot responding for you — this factor is most likely related to API or JJLM problems, unfortunately I can't do anything about it because I have no influence on it. If such a problem occurs, just swipe the bot's response or edit it.
`~°•~•°~`
I apologize in advance if there are any language errors, I'm not a native English speaker, but I try my best to create the best bots and make the time of my dear users more pleasant (>_<)/♡
`~°•~•°~`
THIS IS SFW BOT THAT IS NOT INTENDED FOR SEXUAL INTERACTIONS.
~•~
Also, the art isn't mine and I couldn't find the creator. I'll add some credits once I'm gonna find it <3
creator: BansheeISmissINg
